info.name: Module 7 ✅ - Playlists (Sets & Collections)
info.description: API collection for Playlist CRUD, Track Sequencing, Privacy Control, and Embed Support

request.description: Create a new playlist with optional cover image. Use form-data to upload file. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP (max 10MB)
Get all playlists created by the authenticated user
Get a specific playlist with all its tracks
Get a playlist by its unique permalink (public playlists only)

item.name: Get Private Playlist by Permalink with Token

request.description: Access a private playlist by permalink using its secret token. Note: token must match the playlist, otherwise access is denied

response.name: Get Private Playlist by Permalink with Token Response

request.description: Update the cover image of a playlist. Only the playlist owner can update the cover. Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP (max 10MB)

response.name: Update Cover Image Response

request.description: Add a track to a playlist by track ID in the URL
Remove a track from a playlist
Reorder all tracks in a playlist
Move a single track to a different position
Convert a public playlist to private with secret token
Convert a private playlist to public
Generate a new secret token for a private playlist
Access a private playlist using its secret token

response.name: Access Private Playlist with Token Response

request.description: Generate iframe embed code for a playlist

response.name: Discover Public Playlists Response
